title: Piratecraft Modpack
description: A modpack that allows you sail the seas like a pirate and also come across large ocean mounments, sea creatures, and much more
body:
# Piratecraft Modpack

The Piratecraft modpack, is a modpack which allows players to explore the open world with exploring the seas and leading themselves (or if they play multiplayer with their crew) on many adventures through seas which can include finding ships generated in the world.

# Features

- Lets Forge Pirates
- Aquamirae
- Tax' Ocean Villager
- Swashbucklers
- YUNG's Better Ocean monuments
- Towns and Towers
